summary: R.4 Testing Complete - Public pages now show VAT prices (С ДДС). All features verified: (1) ProjectDetail PropertyCell cards show prices with 'с ДДС' suffix, (2) PropertyDetail shows large VAT price in dark card with small 'без ДДС' price below, (3) VAT disclaimer 'Всички показани цени са с включен ДДС 20%' visible after property listing, (4) 'Цена / м²' removed from PropertyDetail, (5) Sold/compensation properties don't show prices, (6) Капаро 0 button works correctly, (7) Admin pages still show separate 'Без ДДС' and 'С ДДС' columns (R.2 regression OK).
critical_code_review_comments: ProjectDetail.jsx: calculateWithVat import and usage correct (line 17, 300)
ProjectDetail.jsx: PropertyCell correctly calculates displayPriceWithVat = calculateWithVat(displayPriceNet, 20)
ProjectDetail.jsx: VAT suffix 'с ДДС' displayed in small text (text-xs text-slate-500) after price
PropertyDetail.jsx: PublicPriceCell component correctly shows large VAT price + small 'без ДДС' price
PropertyDetail.jsx: 'Цена / м²' Spec cell correctly removed (not in code)
PropertyDetail.jsx: PublicPriceCell uses col-span-2 for full width in grid
InlinePriceCell.jsx: calculateWithVat helper unchanged, correctly multiplies by (1 + vatRate/100)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing Хаджи Димитър project with 52 properties.
context_for_next_testing_agent: R.4 fully tested. Public pages now show VAT prices. Key test points: (1) ProjectDetail PropertyCell shows price with 'с ДДС' suffix (e.g., '336 835 € с ДДС'), (2) PropertyDetail PublicPriceCell shows large VAT price in dark card + small 'без ДДС · ДДС 20%' text below, (3) VAT disclaimer visible after property listing, (4) 'Цена / м²' removed from PropertyDetail, (5) Sold properties don't show prices, (6) Admin pages unchanged (R.2 regression OK).

verified_features.details: Available properties show prices like '336 835 € с ДДС', '9000 € с ДДС'

verified_features.feature: ProjectDetail: Sold/compensation properties don't show prices
verified_features.details: Sold properties (Продаден) show no price, only area and rooms

verified_features.details: Text 'Всички показани цени са с включен ДДС 20%' visible in small font below Tabs

PropertyDetail: Large VAT price in dark card (col-span-2)
verified_features.details: Shows '336 835 € с ДДС' in large font in dark bg-slate-900 card

verified_features.feature: PropertyDetail: Small 'без ДДС · ДДС 20%' text below price
verified_features.details: Shows '280 696 € без ДДС · ДДС 20%' in small text-xs text-white/50
Price per sqm cell correctly removed per R.4 requirement

verified_features.feature: PropertyDetail: Other spec cells present (Стаи, Чиста площ, Общи части, Обща площ, Етаж, Изложение)
PropertyDetail: 'Капаро 0' button works for available properties
Regression: Admin /admin/properties shows 'Без ДДС' and 'С ДДС' columns
verified_features.details: Both columns visible with correct values (R.2 functionality preserved)
